Notice Of Motion And Motion To Intervene Of The Federal Housing Finance Agency Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. TIMOTHY J. GORRY, Esq. of Michelman & Robinson, LLP (Tel: 310-299-5500) for plaintiff Commerce Home Mortgage, LLC (via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. DOUGLAS A. WINTHROP, Esq. of Arnold & Porter Kaye Scholer LLP (Tel: 415-471-4024) for proposed intervenor Federal Housing Financy Agency (in person);
Atty. JOHN M. LANDRY, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP (Tel: 213-620-1780) for defendant Federal Home Loan Bank of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: INTERVENOR FEDERAL HOUSING FINANCE AGENCY's Motion To Intervene.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Proposed intervenor Federal Housing Finance Agency's ("FHFA") motion to intervene is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.
